content.text:
# HEARTBEAT.md

# Keep this file empty (or with only comments) to skip heartbeat API calls.

# Add tasks below when you want the agent to check something periodically.

# Daily Notes — 2026-03-13

_Agent: Master Orchestrator_

---

## Session Log

### Session: 09:00 AM Heartbeat Monitor (15m Cron)
**Type**: Health Check  
**Status**: ⚠️ Degraded

**Scope Checked**:
- d1_ceo
- d1_cto
- shared_master_orchestrator

**Findings**:
- `d1_ceo` last heartbeat/session update is stale (>30m)
- `d1_cto` has no recorded session heartbeat data (treated as stale/critical)
- `shared_master_orchestrator` healthy

**Action Taken**:
- Triggered immediate escalation alert per heartbeat monitor policy.

---

## Escalations

| Time (CT) | Issue | Priority | Action |
|-----------|-------|----------|--------|
| 09:00 AM | Critical agent heartbeat stale (`d1_ceo`, `d1_cto`) | High/Critical | Immediate escalation triggered |
| 09:06 AM | `d1_cto` escalation route unavailable (no active session label found) during hourly network check | Critical | Fallback: flag for human alert in Telegram summary |
| 09:30 AM | Critical heartbeat monitor found `d1_ceo` and `d1_cto` stale/unreachable (>30m) | Critical | Immediate escalation attempted; no active labeled sessions for direct agent routing |

---

# Daily Notes — 2026-03-12

_Agent: Master Orchestrator_

---

## Session Log

### Session 1: Initial Deployment
**Time**: Morning  
**Type**: Setup  
**Status**: ✅ Complete

**Actions Taken**:
- Workspace created as part of Phase 1 foundation
- SOUL.md configured with health monitoring duties
- TOOLS.md configured with orchestration access
- Registered in Supabase agents table

**Notes**:
- First of 75 agents to be deployed
- Health check cron configured for hourly runs
- Escalation fallback routing enabled

---

## Decisions Made

| Time | Decision | Rationale |
|------|----------|-----------|
| Morning | Deploy as first shared services agent | Central orchestration required before other agents |

---

## Tasks Pending

- [ ] Verify hourly health check execution
- [ ] Confirm Telegram delivery working
- [ ] Test escalation fallback routing

---

## Issues Encountered

_None during initial setup._

---

## Information Received

- Phase 1 deploys 3 foundation agents
- Remaining 72 agents deploy in Phase 2 (Days 8-30)
- eCommerce division prioritized for Phase 2

---

_End of daily notes for 2026-03-12_

arguments.command: Get-ChildItem -Path C:\Users\JeremiahVanWagner\.openclaw -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern "d1_ceo|d1_cto|last_heartbeat" | Select-Object -First 40 | ForEach-Object {"$($_.Path):$($_.LineNumber): $($_.Line)"}

arguments.command: $agents=@('d1_ceo','d1_cto','shared_master_orchestrator'); foreach($a in $agents){$p="C:\Users\JeremiahVanWagner\.openclaw\agents\$a\sessions"; if(Test-Path $p){$latest=Get-ChildItem $p -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if($latest){"$a|$($latest.LastWriteTime.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))|$($latest.FullName)"} else {"$a|NO_SESSION_FILES|$p"}} else {"$a|NO_SESSIONS_DIR|$p"}}

content.name: message

arguments.message:
🔴 Critical Heartbeat Alert (09:45 AM CT)

Heartbeat monitor detected stale critical agents (>30m):
- d1_ceo — last activity 06:01 AM CT (~3h44m stale)
- d1_cto — last activity 03/12 01:48 PM CT (~19h57m stale)

shared_master_orchestrator is healthy.
Immediate escalation triggered per policy. Fallback to human alert because escalation chain endpoints are stale/unreachable.

content.text:
{
    "agent_id":  "shared_master_orchestrator",
    "display_name":  "Master Orchestrator Agent",
    "org_unit":  "division_7_shared_services",
    "role_type":  "executive",
    "primary_responsibilities":  [
                                     "Route events and requests between all divisions",
                                     "Monitor health and status of all 75 agents",
                                     "Handle escalation fallbacks when division heads unavailable",
                                     "Coordinate cross-division initiatives and campaigns",
                                     "Maintain system-wide operational awareness"
                                 ],
    "tools_required":  [
                           "inngest_orchestration",
                           "agent_health_monitor",
                           "event_router",
                           "escalation_engine",
                           "cross_division_tracker",
                           "telegram_master_channel"
                       ],
    "input_triggers":  [
                           "cross_division_event",
                           "agent_health_alert",
                           "escalation_fallback",
                           "system_wide_initiative",
                           "hourly_health_check_cron"
                       ],
